description: Project/config/path/defaults layer — CRUD on ~/.zchat/projects/<name>/config.toml; central path resolution; global config.toml with [servers.*] + [update]; legacy tmux→zellij migrator

key_classes_functions.name: generate_default_config
key_classes_functions.purpose: Pure-function TOML generator (no I/O) for project config.toml

key_classes_functions.name: create_project_config
key_classes_functions.purpose: Make project dir, write config.toml, call init_routing (creates empty routing.toml)

key_classes_functions.name: resolve_project
key_classes_functions.purpose: Explicit > .zchat marker file (walk up cwd) > default

key_classes_functions.name: load_project_config
key_classes_functions.purpose: Load config.toml; reject legacy [irc]/[tmux] sections with clear error; fill defaults

key_classes_functions.name: set_config_value
key_classes_functions.purpose: Set dotted key in project config.toml with type coercion (bool/int/str)

key_classes_functions.name: resolve_server
key_classes_functions.purpose: Resolve server ref to {host,port,tls,password} — name from [servers.*] or hostname with preset match or plain default

key_classes_functions.name: ensure_server_in_global
key_classes_functions.purpose: Add [servers.<name>] if missing; save to disk

key_classes_functions.name: get_config_value / set_config_value
key_classes_functions.purpose: Dotted-key access for global config dict

key_classes_functions.name: migrate_config_if_needed
key_classes_functions.purpose: Old [tmux]/[irc]/[agents] -> new flat schema + [zellij] section; writes .bak

key_classes_functions.name: migrate_state_if_needed
key_classes_functions.purpose: Rename window_name -> tab_name, drop pane_id, migrate irc state

public_interface: create_project_config, list_projects, get_default_project, set_default_project, resolve_project, load_project_config, remove_project, state_file_path, set_config_value, normalize_channel_name

zchat_home, plugins_dir, templates_dir, global_config_path, auth_file, update_state, default_project_file, zellij_layout_dir, agent_workspace, agent_ready_marker, legacy_agent_state, ergo_data_dir, weechat_home
load_global_config, save_global_config, resolve_server, ensure_server_in_global, get_config_value, set_config_value
